title: A phase-field model for fracture in soft solids under finite deformation
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: This paper presents a phase-field formulation for fracture in soft solids undergoing large deformation, with emphasis on crack nucleation, propagation, and the coupling between nonlinear elasticity and damage evolution.

title: Data-driven homogenization of architected metamaterials with nonlinear microstructure
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: A data-driven framework is developed for predicting the effective response of architected metamaterials with nonlinear microstructural behavior. The method combines numerical homogenization with reduced-order surrogate modeling.

title: Crystal plasticity analysis of size effects in gradient nanostructured metals
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: The influence of microstructural length scales on the plastic deformation of gradient nanostructured metals is investigated using a crystal plasticity framework with geometrically necessary dislocations.
